mapper.select: select config_group_id, product_id, group_name, group_type, is_required, is_multiple, sort_order, create_time, update_time from sys_product_config_group where product_id = #{productId} order by sort_order
mapper.insert: insert into sys_product_config_group (product_id, group_name, group_type, is_required, is_multiple, sort_order, create_time, update_time) values (#{productId}, #{groupName}, #{groupType}, #{isRequired}, #{isMultiple}, #{sortOrder}, sysdate(), sysdate())
